mapper.select: /** UsptCnsltHistDao.select */ select hist_id , extrc_mfcmm_id , talk_dt , lsn_result_cd , cnslt_cn , creator_id , created_dt from uspt_cnslt_hist where hist_id = #{histId}

/** UsptCnsltHistDao.selectList */ select hist_id , extrc_mfcmm_id , talk_dt , to_char(talk_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI' ) as talk_dt_nm , lsn_result_cd , fn_cmm_get_code_nm('LSN_RESULT',lsn_result_cd) as lsn_result_nm , cnslt_cn , fn_cmm_get_member(creator_id) as register_nm , creator_id , created_dt , to_char(created_dt, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS' ) as regist_dt , row_number() over (order by created_dt asc) as rn from uspt_cnslt_hist where extrc_mfcmm_id = #{extrcMfcmmId}
mapper.delete: /** UsptCnsltHistDao.deleteByCmitId */ delete from uspt_cnslt_hist where hist_id in ( select c.hist_id from uspt_evl_mfcmm_extrc a inner join uspt_extrc_mfcmm b on a.mfcmm_extrc_id = b.mfcmm_extrc_id inner join uspt_cnslt_hist c on c.extrc_mfcmm_id = b.extrc_mfcmm_id where a.evl_cmit_id = #{evlCmitId} )
